name: BTPay
description: Self-hosted Bitcoin payment processor. No third parties. No monthly fees.

BTPAY_DEMO.description: Run in demo mode with sample data (set to 1 for demo)

BTPAY_JWT_ADMIN.description: JWT signing key for admin tokens

BTPAY_JWT_LOGIN.description: JWT signing key for login tokens

BTPAY_JWT_API.description: JWT signing key for API tokens

BTPAY_JWT_INVITE.description: JWT signing key for invite tokens

BTPAY_REFNUM_KEY.description: NaCl SecretBox key for reference numbers (32 bytes hex)

BTPAY_REFNUM_NONCE.description: NaCl SecretBox nonce for reference numbers (24 bytes hex)
